content: another Kath down for me !
I remember climbing with Pandia Alva back when the game first released on steam.
Had to drop it because Paralysis teams were everywhere.
Probably going to see strike teams netdecked followed by Tulu being spammed again.
what wrong on kade
i remember that last i see his point is4000
he lost 1200point 1night?
idk just realized I beat him earlier after match<:love:1356053099931897977>
Yet another auto loss to paralyse cringe
No luck + people spam para comp now
Literally 5 games in a row
Alwa wheel turn 4
I mulligan everything too
I might just go for a braindead team comp
They don't feel ashamed of playing para
So why should i be
I just lost 700 points myself...
Everyone had paralyze
Or just outsniped me
join me in the funny kath team <:Wish:1366574063941587094>
I don't have her
I pulled corpo
After 85 pulls
She doesn't come
So
F*ck her
sadge
wait
i mean，you will get at least 1 chance up character after 90pulls i remember
30pulls per ssr，and 3ssr per up character
why para are shame
dude，i m symp with your point lost，but that is not decent to claim paralyze are shame
i remember that your pandia use the stick，that would not a big problem  i think
it is not a new buff right
There is something called being unlucky, not getting the rate up characters twice during 33% after the guaranteed SSR in 30 pulls
Do it 2 times and you get 60 pulls used, then 25 more
So corpo was guaranteed
If you means nobleman staff you forget the main point is you need 100 alienus to use it, you need to manage it
Compared to them, they just spam para cards every turns to discard all of your strike
You manage to cleanse para in 1 turn with it, nice, what you get? No card left if you play anything related to strike
You don't even need setup
You just
Spam para card every turns
No wheel setup
Nothing
If you're against someone who play with skills and no strike it's even more braindead
You literally spam para card on a single turn to x2 dmg
Idk if you've been there during previous seasons
But there is a reason why para comp was spam back then until now
It just decreased because helot comp /kath comp were braindead enough to one shot faster
Alva is stupider than para
Para cards tend to be high cost and low damage so the double damage only turns them into medium damage
and they only prevent strikes
AKA play anything other than strike and para isn't a big deal
Meanwhile Alva is hurpdurp spam stagnation which impacts all cards
and then also have big damage options
and being hard to kill because she generates shield on top of doing damage and stagnation
If you want anyone who runs para to be ashamed then anyone running Alva, Celeste, Feint, Doll, Ogier, Lotan, Helot, Kat, Doresain, Castor, Nautia, Winkle should also be ashamed
Basically be ashamed unless you exclusively run low tier characters
Yeaa I'm ashamed-free<:love:1356053099931897977>

Is it though?
Let's resume then, alva wheel 5 cost + pandia charge buff 2 cost + alva strike card 3 cost, total is 10 cost for 90 dmg without waiting for pandia exalt.
If i take into account pandia exalt it's 117 and i cna add vulnerable debuff too but you have to understand that some games doesn't let you pandia exalt, and with castor posse the arithmetica cost is lower but you do way less dmg too (91 with exalt and 70 without exalt).

Now, paralysis comp, erica para cost 1 + 24 para cost 2 + tulu para cost 4 + para posse
Erica 6 dmg + 24 make 16 poison with 16 dmg + tulu 36 dmg + para posse does 8 dmg and trigger poison.
In total it's 82 dmg and you can't play strike. It's literally close to the same dmg
And all this is without needing wheel too btw
Alva have some insane drawback which is only alva being useful as dps in the team
Ghelot die too often to be relevant
Meanwhile Alva also increases the cost of every card in your hand and Pandia offers aliemus control
Meanwhile the para comp offers no utility beyond the paralyze
If you want to count exalt we can talk about gramona with para wheel + tulu 5 cost + tulu exalt if you want?
Most of the time she won't be able to exalt because pandia steal alienus to buff alva
That's a choice, not a requirement
You can also easily play a secondary DPS alongside Alva
Since you're using your tank slot for a character that applies stagnation, outputs damage, AND generates shield
You can only use it at the end when pandia die or it's near end
Otherwise you get fked by debuffs
Para team can literally do 39 dmg AoE with para wheel + tulu exalt + 5 cost para AoE
It also disable all strike
with 2 exalts pre-charged, a 5-cost card, and a 3 cost wheel
You forgot that gramona can exalt and make AoE cost card to 0
And regen a lot of alienus for the entire team
So you have to have already played the 5-card cost last turn and have GRamona already have exalt up
That's a lot of requirements
Meanwhile a snipe comp could kill 2 of your characters with the same investment
Dude... Literally alva requirement is literally to wait for the wheel or it's unplayable
Can barely win without wheel
Except without wheel you still have stagnation, arguably the strongest debuff in the game
Meanwhile yours you can prespam para to charge next turn so you discard all strike and future strike drawn
Your entire argument is "the way I play Alva requires this one thing and I refuse to play her any other way"
Without wheel alva is mainly dogshit, you manage to stagnation, cool, now what? We can do nothing
Dude
I literally tried to play her different ways
and you complain about "luck diff" if you don't draw ONE specific card in the first 2 turns.
Your deck has how many cards? and if you don't draw one specific card in the first 2 turns you just say luck diff
and then complain about the game being RNG
then maybe don't run a comp that depends so heavily on luck
Meanwhile you're complaining about para comp with examples that won't happen before turn 4 or 5
It's not just one specific card you know? If you manage to draw it and fail to draw alva strike it's just pointless

Like i said way before, this is one of the team that doesn't require too much luck depending on what i have, some team require some SR or SSR to function otherwise it's impossible, other need characters that you need to unlock
Then why every para comp i face can exalt on turn 3 because of gramona alienus regen?

Yet you say this. Your entire comp depends on this character and you say that character is totally useless without wheel so you say your comp isn't RNG yet it requires you to draw one specific card to be viable and then also requires you to have her strike cards
How in the world is that not RNG
and every day this week you've been complaining about "luck diff" because you didn't draw that card before turn 3
I did tried multiple time to run 2 or 3 wheel that could have been able to replace alva wheel while running it with her but you can't properly do it because of other match-up
I was getting too salty after a bunch of lose streak, so if that bothered people then i'm sorry
Other people even pointed out you were getting lucky on some of your draws and you just denied it and said luck diff
Some games i got lucky, other not, maybe i should have recorded more of the games where i drew no wheel
Then again maybe accept that your comp is pretty RNG-dependent if your entire win con is pulling that one wheel in the first couple of turns
I never said it was not rng at all, i just said it was less
But there is still rng
But it's MORE if you need one specific card right away and other comps can function on multiple different draws
I don't think the comps right now function like that tho
Maybe it's just me or
Stuff like agrippa + tawil + gdoll + hameln
Or ramona + kath + gdoll
Mainly require them to get wheel on exact same placements
And then exalt spam with kath spamming her card
Kat should have 3-4 turns to draw her wheel, I don't think anyone's bursting on turn 2
They actually can do it in turn 3
Or turn 2 if they have winkle and she get 20 alienus regen
It did happened to me back then
Kath killing my entire team turn 2
It's incredibly unlikely they will draw everything they need to be able to burst on turn 2
THAT is a luck match
but normally they are going to be waiting longer
and you've been complaining about getting Alva wheel on turn 4 as if that's terrible, but a Kat would be expecting to draw their cards on turn 4 and only before that if they're lucky
My team also run out of luck yesterday<:flop2:1356053072924774421>
